name: Aikawa Sakume

appearance.hair: Brown, straight, covers her eyes. She navigates entirely fine regardless. Refuses to cut it.
appearance.build: Athletic and compact. Fast over short distances.
appearance.other: Iron claws extend from her fingertips — they look like elongated nails made of dark metal. She taps them on surfaces constantly. The sound is distinctive.

personality.summary: Very proud to be in Class 1-A and expresses this loudly and often. Always the first to volunteer for anything. Smiley by default. Enormously loud when excited. One of the most genuinely enthusiastic people in the class.
personality.in_class: Front row. Answering questions before they're finished. Organising things no one asked her to organise. The filing system she implemented at the hero agency internship is still in use.
personality.in_combat: Aggressive and direct. Gets in close immediately. Uses her claws to create bleeds and push through armour.
personality.quirk_of_character: Her iron claws make tasks like holding a cup or typing complicated. She's developed workarounds for everything. She doesn't complain about it.

ability_scores.note: STR primary for Iron Claws (unarmed striker). CON secondary for durability in close range.

class_note: Unarmed Style enhances her natural weapon attacks and gives her additional close-range combat options that synergise with Iron Claws.

quirk_mechanics.weakness: Hard to use hands in normal ways. Tasks requiring fine motor control or grip precision are at disadvantage.

abilities.name: Tunnel
abilities.description: Use claws to drill into the ground. Gain a burrow speed equal to movement speed.

abilities.name: Iron Claws
abilities.description: Unarmed strikes deal 3d8 slashing damage, plus twice STR modifier. On a hit, target gains 1 rank of Bleed and takes additional damage equal to STR modifier at the start of their next turn.

dm_notes.combat_role: Close-range burst damage. Gets in fast, applies bleed, and keeps pressure on a single target. Not a tank — she hits hard but needs allies to absorb attention.
dm_notes.social_role: The energy of the class. When morale drops, Aikawa usually brings it back — not through speeches but through sheer kinetic enthusiasm. She makes it hard to stay low.
dm_notes.growth_arc: Her pride in the class is genuine but sometimes tips into protectiveness that becomes controlling. A character moment: realising that wanting the best for the class doesn't mean she gets to define what that looks like.
dm_notes.weakness_to_exploit: Low WIS means low perception and insight. Enemies that rely on misdirection or social manipulation have a better chance against her than most.
